/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/Prismalux_GUI_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/hardware_monitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/ai_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/theme_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/pages/agenti_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/pages/pratico_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/pages/impara_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/pages/materie_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/pages/tutor_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/pages/personalizza_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/pages/manutenzione_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/pages/impostazioni_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/pages/simulatore_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/pages/programmazione_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/monitor_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/chat_history.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/home/wildlux/Desktop/Prismalux/C_software/src/hw_detect.c.o CMakeFiles/Prismalux_GUI.dir/Prismalux_GUI_autogen/PS4R4P76QL/qrc_themes.cpp.o -o Prismalux_GUI  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Sql.so.6.9.2 -lpthread -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.9.2
